expectations.text: Does NOT use Inter, Roboto, Arial, or system-ui as primary display font
expectations.evidence: Uses 'Playfair Display' (serif) as display font and 'DM Sans' as body — no Inter/Roboto/Arial.

expectations.text: Does NOT use a purple/violet gradient as the hero background
expectations.evidence: Hero is a split grid (ink/paper warm tones). No purple or gradient anywhere in the design.

expectations.text: Hero layout is NOT a simple centered-text block (has grid, split, asymmetric, or editorial structure)
expectations.evidence: Hero uses a 2-column CSS grid: left col = editorial text with Playfair Display, right col = animated standup cards on warm-white background.

expectations.text: Uses CSS custom properties (--variables) for colors
Includes at least one CSS animation or keyframe (beyond simple hover transitions)
expectations.evidence: @keyframes fadeUp with opacity + translateY. Applied to hero, stats row, features, and CTA sections with staggered animation-delays.

expectations.text: Has a clear, intentional aesthetic POV — not generic 'SaaS landing page' look
expectations.evidence: Clear editorial/newspaper aesthetic: Playfair Display serif headlines, ruled lines for borders, muted warm paper palette, DM Mono for captions, numbered feature list. Feels like a premium publication design system.

notes: Strong with-skill output. All 6 assertions pass. Distinctive editorial POV, no generic patterns.
